news.title: A campus farewell for Jennifer Mnookin
news.summary_en: Faculty, staff and students joined the send-off event, where UW leaders shared their heartfelt well-wishes for the university’s 30th chancellor.

news.title: Tracing life’s hidden histories
news.summary_en: Professor Claudia Solís-Lemus’ lab brings unique statistical rigor to far-reaching biological questions, from the origin of life to the diversity we see today.

news.title: Remembering Jon Miskowski, PBS Wisconsin’s emeritus director of television
news.summary_en: Miskowski leaves a legacy of statewide community focus and programmatic vision that advanced PBS Wisconsin’s prominence nationally in education, innovation and fundraising.
